metadata.description: STOYC Realtor OS — a productized Claude plugin suite for real estate agents.

plugins.name: core
plugins.description: Your daily command center: CRM-aware morning briefings, lead replies and follow-ups in your voice, appointment prep, contact research, open-house sign-in capture, and live dashboards. Includes voice personalization and a self-improving memory that learns your preferences.

plugins.name: marketing
plugins.description: Create listings, social posts, newsletters, blogs, and ads in your voice; plan a content calendar; manage your Google Business Profile and reviews; and audit your website for SEO and AI-search (GEO) ranking. Everything sounds like you.

plugins.name: listings
plugins.description: CMAs, market reports, property and neighborhood research, and buyer-match — researched live from the web with cited, verify-before-client guardrails. No MLS required.
